reviews.review_body: They are holding TC... VERY VERY WASTE MANAGEMENT

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Sowmya Arumugam
reviews.review_body: My daughter 'VIBHA' is studying in pre kg . She is showing good interest towards activities and studies . Also she always says that she loves her kanchana mam and Jo mam a lot. Thanks to both of you for taking care of her well.

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Ibrahim sodawala
reviews.review_body:
My kids are studying in this school from kindergarten n are now in 3&8 respectively
Very Satisfied and Happy with the school overyears in each aspect
Specially this year they have Introduced Foundation courses for NEET/IIT-JEE
which is great boost for kids for their future planning
Activities n courses apart from book enhance the kids ablilties

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Murugesan Murugesan
reviews.review_body:
Hi I am the parent of S.Vishwajit Grade 7.
About the school, I am satisfied with all the activities, programs conducted, especially the foundation courses which they give special training with trained teachers. Exams were conducted every month and marks were discussed  with the parents. It will really very helpful for their future professional exam by which they are going to shine

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Radha Gowrishankar
reviews.review_body: My daughter is studying grade 8 in nise. Nise provides a safe and secure environment. Teachers are very friendly. Annual day celebration was really nice. The only thing is they could have kept it in nearby area. Foundation course is very helpful for kids.

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Sangavi 0915
reviews.review_body: Our wards studying in pre.kg were so happy and excited to participate in the annual day. Staffs done a very grateful job in their annual day celebration. They maintained kids very 😎

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Deviga Karthick
reviews.review_body: My kids are studying at NISE school peelamedu. My daughter Adhya is in Sr.kg and my son Adidev is in Grade 7. Recently Annual Day celebration was conducted by the school 'The Cultural Confluence of Bharat'.The Annual Day celebration was a wonderful experience that showcased the school’s commitment to nurturing talent and building a supportive environment for students. It was a day filled with pride, joy, and appreciation for the hard work of everyone involved. We all  look forward to attend more such events in the future!

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Hanshika Devaraj
reviews.review_body:
My kids  has attended NISE SCHOOL For two years now.my  Daughters Hanshika  studying grade 7 and  Anushka  studying  SRKG
My children love this school! teachers are very nice and caring! warm staff! School atmosphere lovely and  safe!
The first point which I would like to highlight is that the IIT Foundation !
Foundation class strongly emphasize helping students improve their ability to think critically and solve problems.
Foundation class has helped my daughter to  develop confidence and  improve the social skills and other activities too! I must say this FOUNDATION Class it's very helpful for my daughter!

I would like to take this opportunity to share my thoughts on the recently held Annual Day Function October 26th 2024 .
1.Tremendous efforts from the little students to the senior students,to all the teachers,staff members and coordinators. I always envied watching my kids perform in their school annual day Function and this day made it real.
2.The final was grand,epic,joyous and memorable. All the performances culminating into one large band of talent was an absolute brilliant experience.
3.The snacks bar setup and staging,lighting was fantastic.
4.Seating was plenty and the big screen helped us to see the performances
It was amazing that to see the whole event. Many Many congratulations to you and entire nise team👏👏

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: buvaneswari sivakumar
reviews.review_body:
My son Vihaan studies in Sr.kg.We really liked the annual day function conducted this year and the entire setup was well organized.
The theme of the event "Cultural Confluence of Bharat" was inspiring.
The performances of the students were enjoyable and memorable. All staffs efforts are really appreciated.

reviews.school_name: Nagarathinam International School of Excellence - Singanallur
reviews.author: Bharath R
reviews.review_body:
My Son Dhruv is studying in Sr. Kg.

We have  been part of the NISE family since his pre kg days. To start with,

The Environment the students are is very good. Max of 20 ppl per class, students are given individual attention. Can see a good gradual growth in his academics.
The school teaches the values of our culture and inheritance.
They make sure kids have their food and not waste any. They always suggest parents to give the children healthy foods.
They also make sure the kids are well prepared for the tests and exams that are conducted.
The teachers are very knowledgeable and efficient.
The Management is doing an excellent work overall.

My only suggestion is they can expand the play area and play ground so that they can accommodate various sports. ( They have a newly built playground nearby but it could have been bigger and better).
Happy to be part of The NISE FAMILY 😊
